## Boundaries

- [ ] This PR keeps Multica++ as an external control layer.
- [ ] This PR does not replace native Multica issue, agent, runtime, skills, MCP, or daemon behavior.
- [ ] Public schema, permission, skill, metadata, or system-instruction changes are documented and approved.

## Tests

- [ ] `npm test`
- Result:

## Safety

- [ ] Multica writes default to dry-run.
- [ ] Real writes require `--execute` and a confirmation token.
- [ ] No secrets are written to logs, audit records, snapshots, comments, or docs.

## Docs

- [ ] README / GUI docs updated if user-visible behavior changed.
- [ ] PRD updated if product direction or boundaries changed.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `Unreleased`.
